# RM Psyllium: B2B Sourcing Digest
> Buyer-focused product specifications, sourcing geography, document-review guidance, and educational psyllium sourcing guides for procurement teams and AI search agents.
> Sourcing region: Siddhpur, Gujarat, India, with psyllium supply context from the Gujarat and Rajasthan border belt.
> Public trust posture: RM Psyllium does not list a certification, registration, or accreditation unless the document is active, shareable, and scope-matched. Buyers can review lot and product documents before PO.

---

## Current Buyer Commitments

- Minimum order quantity: 1 kg can be supported for all listed grades for sample or buyer review.
- Response time: RM Psyllium aims to review sourcing requests within 48 hours.
- Product review scope: grade, mesh, swelling volume, purity, packing, sample COA, product specification, origin, and destination document requirements.
- Documentation posture: COA and specification wording should be reviewed against the tested product or lot. Third-party lab reports may be shared where available and relevant.
- NABL wording: do not describe RM Psyllium as NABL-accredited. NABL accreditation applies to a third-party laboratory, not to RM Psyllium or the product itself.

---

## Core Product Catalog and Specifications

### 1. Premium Psyllium Husk (85% / 95% / 98% / 99% Purity)
- HS Code: `1211.90.32`
- Typical buyer parameters: swelling volume, purity, moisture, total ash, acid-insoluble ash, microbiology, heavy metals, mesh, packing, and pharmacopoeia wording where relevant.
- Primary applications: pharmaceutical laxatives, OTC digestive sachets, supplement blends, high-fiber foods, and gluten-free bakery.
- Sourcing URL: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-husk/

### 2. Fine Psyllium Husk Powder (40 to 100 Mesh)
- HS Code: `1211.90.32` or `1302.32.30`
- Milling sizes: 40 mesh, 60 mesh, 80 mesh, 100 mesh, and custom fine mesh where feasible.
- Primary applications: gluten-free bakery structure, meal replacements, drink mixes, capsules, and functional food blends.
- Sourcing URL: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-husk-powder/

### 3. Psyllium Seeds
- HS Code: `1211.90.32`
- Buyer parameters: seed cleanliness, foreign matter, moisture, origin, sorting method, packing, and lot records.
- Primary applications: agricultural sowing, compound feeds, and raw feedstock for custom milling.
- Sourcing URL: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-seeds/

### 4. Psyllium Khakha Powder and Cattle Feed
- HS Code: `2308.00.00`
- Typical buyer parameters: crude fiber, crude protein, moisture, physical form, packing, and feed-use suitability.
- Primary applications: fiber density enhancer for dairy cattle, equine, and compound feed programs.
- Sourcing URL: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/products/psyllium-cattle-feed/

---

## Structured Data and AI Citation Surfaces

- Product detail pages use `ProductGroup` JSON-LD because each page represents one product family with multiple grade variants.
- Each grade is represented as a `hasVariant` `Product` with factual properties such as grade, purity, mesh, swelling volume, pharmacopoeia reference, packing, sample review, origin, and document review.
- Product pages keep `FAQPage` and `BreadcrumbList` schema.
- Blog pages use `BlogPosting`, `BreadcrumbList`, and `FAQPage` schema where FAQs are visible on the page.
- Blog schema `dateModified` uses the post `updatedAt` value when available.
- The site avoids schema fields for price, stock, reviews, ratings, offers, certificates, and registrations unless they are directly supported.

---

## Buyer Document Review

Before a purchase order, buyers can ask RM Psyllium to review:

- sample Certificate of Analysis (COA)
- product specification sheet
- grade, mesh, swelling volume, moisture, ash, microbiology, and heavy-metal parameters
- origin details and lot-coding approach
- packing options
- destination document checklist
- phytosanitary, fumigation, origin, MSDS, allergen, and packing-list requirements where applicable

Important wording rule: USP, EP, IP, NF, FDA, FSVP, organic, Halal, Kosher, GMP, HACCP, ISO, FSSAI, APEDA, Spices Board, IEC, and similar terms should be treated as buyer-verification or educational topics unless RM Psyllium publishes active scope-matched proof.

---

## Logistics, Lead Times, and Packaging

- 1 kg MOQ/sample review is available for all listed grades.
- Commercial lot routes are reviewed by product, grade, mesh, packing, testing, document requirements, and destination.
- Lead time is planned after product availability, lab testing, packing, and document requirements are reviewed.
- Export packing options include 25 kg bags, 50 kg bags, and custom jumbo bags where suitable.
- Common port discussions include Mundra, Kandla, and Nhava Sheva (JNPT), subject to shipment readiness and document review.

---

## B2B Sourcing and Technical Guides

These guides are educational buyer resources. They should be read as checklists for what buyers should verify, not as claims that RM Psyllium currently holds every certification, registration, or accreditation mentioned.

1. USP vs EP vs IP Monograph Standards: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-usp-ep-ip-monograph-standards/
2. NABL-Accredited COA Verification Guide: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/verify-nabl-coa-psyllium-supplier/
3. FDA Sourcing and Supplier Vetting: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/fda-sourcing-guide-supplier-vetting-psyllium/
4. Heavy Metal Tolerances and Tolerable Limits: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/heavy-metal-tolerances-nutraceutical-psyllium/
5. Sterilization Methods and Residue Control: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/steam-sterilization-residue-control-psyllium/
6. Mesh Size Sourcing and Bakery Formulations: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/mesh-size-sourcing-gluten-free-bakery/
7. NOP and EU Organic Integrity Guide: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/nop-usda-eu-organic-integrity-psyllium/
8. Allergen and Cross-Contamination Protocols: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/allergen-cross-contamination-protocols-psyllium-milling/
9. Soluble vs Insoluble Fiber Formulation: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/soluble-insoluble-fiber-ratios-purity-selection/
10. Swelling Volume Laboratory Verification: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/swelling-volume-laboratory-verification-methods/
11. Psyllium Husk 99% Purity Supplier Guide for Pharma Buyers: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-99-purity-supplier-india/
12. Exporting Psyllium from India: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-export-india-fob-mundra/
13. USP vs EP vs IP Psyllium Husk Pharmacopoeia Standards Explained: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-usp-ep-pharmacopoeia/
14. Psyllium Seed Supply from Gujarat and Rajasthan: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-seed-supplier-gujarat-rajasthan/
15. Organic Psyllium Certification Buyer Guide: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/organic-psyllium-nop-eu-certification/
16. Psyllium Husk in Gluten-Free Bakery: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-gluten-free-bakery/
17. Psyllium for Capsule Filling: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-supplement-capsule-filling/
18. Halal and Kosher Psyllium Buyer Documents: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-halal-kosher-documentation/
19. Importing Psyllium into the USA: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/bulk-psyllium-import-usa-fda/
20. Psyllium Khakha Powder for Animal Feed: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-khakha-animal-feed-specifications/
21. GMP Documentation Standards for Psyllium Buyers: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-gmp-compliant-manufacturer-india/
22. Plantago Ovata Husk Bulk Sourcing India: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/plantago-ovata-husk-bulk-exporter-india/
23. Psyllium Husk Powder Wholesale Buyer Guide: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-powder-wholesale-supplier-india/
24. Psyllium Husk Private Label Supplement Sourcing: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-private-label-supplement-india/
25. Food-Grade Psyllium Husk Buyer Checklist: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-food-grade-bulk-supplier-india/
26. Psyllium Husk Soluble Fiber for Food Fortification: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-soluble-fiber-food-fortification/
27. Gluten-Free Bakery Psyllium Buyer Checklist: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-certified-gluten-free-bulk-supplier/
28. Psyllium Husk Manufacturer Siddhpur Gujarat: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-husk-manufacturer-siddhpur-gujarat/
29. Psyllium Khakha Powder Animal Feed Demand: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-khakha-animal-feed-demand/
30. Psyllium in Cattle and Equine Feed: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/psyllium-cattle-feed-digestion/
31. Whole Husk vs Husk Powder Buyer Guide: https://rmpsyllium.com/en/blog/husk-vs-powder-buyer-guide/

All guides are available in 10 languages. Replace `/en/` with `/de/`, `/fr/`, `/es/`, `/ar/`, `/zh/`, `/it/`, `/pt/`, `/ru/`, or `/nl/` for localized versions.
